name: PostNord Postal and Parcel REST API
what_it_does: PostNord postal and parcel REST API for e-commerce merchants, logistics providers, and enterprises shipping within and to/from Sweden, Denmark, Norway, and Finland to access shipment creation, tracking, parcel label generation, pickup point locators, and delivery management — enabling automated Nordic parcel shipping, returns management, and logistics integration through PostNord's dominant Nordic postal and logistics network. Enables AI agents to manage shipment creation for Nordic parcel booking automation, handle label generation for shipping document production automation, access tracking for parcel status monitoring automation, retrieve pickup point for service point location automation, manage return shipment for reverse logistics automation, handle customs for cross-border Nordic declaration automation, access service point for drop-off location finder automation, retrieve estimated delivery for Nordic transit time calculation automation, manage address validation for Nordic postal address verification automation, and integrate PostNord with e-commerce platforms and WMS systems for Nordic logistics automation.
use_cases: Creating shipments and labels for Nordic e-commerce fulfillment automation agents
Tracking parcel status across Sweden, Denmark, Norway, and Finland for logistics automation agents
Finding pickup points and service points for last-mile delivery optimization automation agents
Managing return shipments for Nordic e-commerce reverse logistics automation agents
not_for: Global shipping outside Nordic countries (PostNord is Nordic-focused, not global carrier)
Freight and heavy goods (PostNord handles parcels and letters, not full truckload freight)
Same-day delivery in non-Nordic markets (PostNord coverage is Scandinavia/Finland focused)
best_when: A Nordic e-commerce merchant, logistics provider, or enterprise wanting AI agents to automate parcel shipping, label generation, tracking, and pickup point management across Sweden, Denmark, Norway, and Finland through PostNord's dominant Nordic postal network.
avoid_when: NORDIC MARKET ONLY: PostNord API covers Sweden, Denmark, Norway, and Finland; automated global carrier assumption creates no_service_area for non-Nordic shipments; automated must use global carriers (DHL, FedEx) for non-Nordic destinations. AGREEMENT REQUIRED: PostNord API requires customer agreement; automated open developer access assumption creates agreement_required; automated must establish PostNord customer account before API access. SERVICE CODES VARY BY COUNTRY: PostNord has different service codes per Nordic country; automated uniform service assumption creates invalid_service_code for cross-country shipments; automated must use country-specific service codes. WEIGHT AND DIMENSION LIMITS: PostNord parcel services have specific weight and size limits; automated unlimited parcel assumption creates parcel_oversized for items exceeding limits; automated must validate parcel dimensions against PostNord service limits.

auth.notes: PostNord uses API key for postal REST API. REST API with JSON. Solna, Sweden HQ. Founded 2009 (merger of Sweden Post and Post Danmark). State-owned (50% Sweden, 50% Denmark). Products: Parcel, Mail, Freight, Logistics, MyPack. Coverage: SE, DK, NO, FI. SDKs: None public. ~30,000 service points. Nordic market leader for postal and parcel. Competes with DHL and UPS for Nordic e-commerce logistics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for registered developers; production requires PostNord customer contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-shipment pricing based on weight, size, service, and destination; contract pricing for volume customers
pricing.notes: Solna SE. State-owned Sweden/Denmark. Per-shipment pricing. Nordic logistics. 30,000+ service points.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; shipment and tracking APIs throttled per customer tier

known_agent_gotchas: COUNTRY-SPECIFIC SERVICE CODES: PostNord uses different service codes per country (SE, DK, NO, FI); automated uniform service assumption creates invalid_service for cross-country routing; automated must map destination country to correct PostNord service code

PICKUP POINT IDS ARE LOCATION-SPECIFIC: Service point IDs must be queried by location; automated hardcoded pickup point assumption creates location_not_found for different regions; automated must query pickup points near recipient address

LABEL FORMAT VARIES BY SERVICE: PostNord labels differ by service type (MyPack Collect vs. Home Delivery); automated single label format assumption creates format_mismatch; automated must request correct label format per service

TRACKING EVENTS HAVE NORDIC LANGUAGE VARIANTS: PostNord tracking event descriptions may be in Swedish or Danish; automated English-only assumption creates untranslated tracking messages; automated must specify language parameter for tracking responses

CUSTOMS DATA REQUIRED FOR NON-EU: Nordic shipments to Norway (non-EU) require customs declarations; automated EU-only assumption creates missing_customs_data for Norway shipments; automated must include customs data for Norwegian recipients
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nordic postal. GDPR. API key. SE/DK/EU. Parcel and recipient address data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Postal logistics. GDPR. API key. Nordic EU. Shipment and recipient data.
